extension.description: Repository hosting the Hermes Kodi add-on (Twilight + CocoScrapers merged fork).
extension.news: Initial release of the Hermes repository.

extension.summary: Hermes - Real Debrid sources add-on with embedded CocoScrapers.
extension.description: This add-on is intended for advanced Kodi users only. You must own the content of any media you play through this addon.
extension.disclaimer: The author of this addon does not host any of the content which is found and has no affiliation with any of the content providers.
extension.license: GNU GENERAL PUBLIC LICENSE. Version 3, 29 June 2007
extension.news: v4.0.1 - First Hermes release. Fork of Twilight 3.2.87 + embedded ScrapperHermes (CocoScrapers 1.0.32). English UI. Fixed Trakt user-list pagination beyond 100 items.
